fields.title: Expose backlog to bundled subagents in the orchestration harness
fields.description: Tau’s bundled agent definitions now use backlog as the planning surface, but orchestrated subagents in this harness still receive the old tool inventory and fail when an agent expects backlog. Wire the runtime/orchestration layer so bundled review/oracle/finder-style flows can receive the backlog tool consistently, without falling back to bd or smart-reviewer workarounds.
